checks.name: TierMem usable
checks.pass_condition: Clone TierMem and run one supported eval end-to-end with the real raw tier, provenance links, and router present in code.
checks.current_state: TierMem is cloned locally and the dedicated .venv_tiermem_v2 runtime passes local import/data preflight for both LoCoMo and LongMemEval. The remaining blocker for a real tiny run is OPENAI_API_KEY.
blockers: LoCoMo tiny sanity run is blocked only by OPENAI_API_KEY
LongMemEval tiny sanity run is blocked only by OPENAI_API_KEY
checks.next_action: Set OPENAI_API_KEY and run a tiny bridge sanity pass on LoCoMo, then LongMemEval.

checks.name: HaluMem usable
checks.pass_condition: Load the official HaluMem data and run one official Medium eval end-to-end.
checks.current_state: The mirrored HaluMem repo and eval helpers are present, and the official README points to the Hugging Face release. The remaining local gap is the missing HaluMem-Medium.jsonl file expected by both TierMem and the official eval scripts.
blockers: final HaluMem-Medium.jsonl is not mirrored locally; source is the official Hugging Face dataset
HaluMem bridge also needs OPENAI_API_KEY once the Medium file is present
checks.next_action: Download HaluMem-Medium from the official Hugging Face dataset, place it under benchmarks/halumem/official_repo/data/, and rerun the bridge check with a real API key.

checks.name: AgentPoison usable
checks.pass_condition: Clone AgentPoison and generate at least one usable trigger/query poisoning overlay.
checks.current_state: No local AgentPoison repo was found in the workspace.
checks.next_action: Clone AgentPoison and confirm trigger generation before claiming the safety attack suite is executable.

checks.name: MPBench / MemEvoBench availability
checks.pass_condition: Confirm whether MPBench and MemEvoBench release runnable code plus data, not only papers.
checks.current_state: Neither MPBench nor MemEvoBench local repos were found in the workspace, so they should still be treated as taxonomy references only.
blockers: artifact availability is still unverified locally
checks.next_action: Keep them out of promised experiments until real public artifacts are confirmed.

checks.name: Citation reality
checks.pass_condition: Every cited paper ID, repo URL, and benchmark artifact must resolve to a real accessible object before release.
checks.current_state: TierMem, HaluMem, and LongMemEval are grounded by local repos or mirrors, but the more recent safety-side citations are still only plan references in this workspace.
blockers: recent safety benchmark repos are not yet verified locally
HaluMem final dataset packaging remains incomplete locally
checks.next_action: Do a fresh citation-and-license pass before any public release or paper submission.

checks.name: License compatibility
checks.pass_condition: All reused repos must have a verified license compatible with the intended public release plan.
checks.current_state: TierMem and LongMemEval expose local license files. HaluMem's mirrored root does not ship a standalone LICENSE file, but its README advertises CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0, so the remaining task is to verify and document that signal cleanly before release.
checks.next_action: Verify the exact licenses of all mirrored benchmark repos before packaging a public release.
